value.proof_prefix: intro c. unfold Fun_eqAxm. induction (function_arity_table L f) as [| n IH].

attempts:
set (n0 := function_arity_table (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) f). assert (Hv : forall n, HC_occurs_in_trms c (fst (varcouples n)) = false /\
                      HC_occurs_in_trms c (snd (varcouples n)) = false). induction n; split; simpl; auto; destruct IHn as [Hl Hr]; simpl; rewrite Hl, Hr; auto. assert (Hbase : HC_occurs_in_frm c
                 (Eqn_frm (Fun_trm f (fst (varcouples n0))) (Fun_trm f (snd (varcouples n0)))) = false). simpl; destruct (Hv n0) as [Hl Hr]; rewrite Hl, Hr; auto. assert (Hlemma : forall (p : frm (augmented_language L Henkin_constants)) n,
                  HC_occurs_in_frm c p = false ->
                  HC_occurs_in_frm c (eqns_imp p n) = false). induction n; intros p Hp; simpl; auto; simpl; rewrite IHn; simpl; auto. exact (Hlemma (Eqn_frm (Fun_trm f (fst (varcouples n0))) (Fun_trm f (snd (varcouples n0)))) n0 Hbase).

assert (H_aux : forall n p, HC_occurs_in_frm c p = false -> HC_occurs_in_frm c (eqns_imp p n) = false).
{ induction n; intros p Hpn; simpl; [assumption | apply IHn; assumption]. }
assert (H_base : HC_occurs_in_frm c
  (prod_rec
     (fun _ : prod
            (trms (augmented_language L Henkin_constants)
               (function_arity_table (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) f))
            (trms (augmented_language L Henkin_constants)
               (function_arity_table (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) f))
      => frm (augmented_language L Henkin_constants))
     (fun lhs rhs : trms (augmented_language L Henkin_constants)
                      (function_arity_table (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) f) =>
      Eqn_frm (Fun_trm f lhs) (Fun_trm f rhs))
     (varcouples
        (function_arity_table (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) f))) = false).
{ induction (function_arity_table (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) f) as [| n IH]; simpl; [reflexivity | apply IH]. }
apply H_aux; assumption.

induction (function_arity_table (augmented_language L Henkin_constants) f) as [| n IH].
- unfold eqns_imp, varcouples; simpl; reflexivity.
- unfold eqns_imp; simpl; rewrite IH; simpl; reflexivity.
